ground_truth.title: Largest video game companies by market cap
ground_truth.main_content: Largest video game companies by market cap. This page lists 233 video game companies with a total market cap of $5.183 trillion. Companies are ranked by market capitalization. The ranking includes columns for Company Name, Market Cap, Price, Today's change, Price over 30 days, and Country. All rankings are updated daily.
with: Rank by Market Cap Earnings Revenue P/E ratio Dividend % Operating Margin Employees
